Frequently Asked Questions
What is ZA-DIVERGENT?
An open-source intelligence bulletin covering South Africa and the surrounding region. Signals are collected, scored, and published by the FORGE OSINT engine. All source material is publicly available.
Is the free tier permanent?
Yes. The public bulletin will always be free. Pro adds depth — full evidence chains, entity dossiers, and machine-readable feeds — for those who need analyst-grade access.
How is this different from news?
ZA-DIVERGENT is structured intelligence, not journalism. Signals are scored by an analytical pipeline, linked to cases and actors, and visualized as a knowledge graph. The output is evidence chains, not articles.
Can I use the API feed?
Pro subscribers get access to pro-feed.json — a machine-readable feed containing full signal data, gravity scores, entity relationships, and case linkages. Suitable for integration with your own tools.
ZA-DIVERGENT ARCHIVE · FORGE OSINT ENGINE · ALL SOURCES OPEN
